ValidationRule.description: מוודא כי מספר הטלפון יכיל 9 או 10 תווים, ויתחיל ב-0 במידה והמטופל ישראלי.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $User.Id = '0054J000002PIdC' || $User.Id = '0054J000002Q8am' || $User.Id = '0054J000002QSkU' || $User.Id = '0054J000004QaYN' || $User.Id = '0054J000004RQEhQAO' || $User.Id = '0054J000000vlO1QAI' || $User.Id = '0058d0000015pem') && (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(phone__c) || ISCHANGED(Account_Country__c )) && NOT(ISBLANK(phone__c)) && CONTAINS(Account_Country__c , "ישראל") && ( NOT(LEN(phone__c) = 9 || LEN(phone__c) = 10) || (LEN(phone__c) = 9 && ( NOT(LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "02" || LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "03" || LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "04" || LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "08" || LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "09" )) || (LEN(phone__c) = 10 &&(NOT(LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "05" || LEFT(phone__c, 2) = "07"))) ))
